name: python3-constantly
title: python3-constantly
description:
Symbolic constants in Python
A library that provides symbolic constant support. It includes
collections and constants with text, numeric, and bit flag
values.
.
Originally twisted.python.constants from the Twisted project.
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-constantly because Symbolic constants in Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-constantly as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-constantly with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-constantly --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
